cluster_label: The floor is my little gym
key_specs: {"materials":"Organic cotton, FSC wood","included_items":"Mat, frame, stage toys, guide"}
product_description_under_30_words: A washable organic cotton floor gym with a wooden frame, hanging toys and a play guide that moves from short tummy spells into reaching and rolling on the living room floor.
ember_verdict: By four to six months the floor becomes a proper workout space, not a quick stretch on a towel. This gym keeps tummy time interesting with reachables that change as rolling starts. The washable mat survives milk dribbles without turning the room into a plastic play zone for every awake spell.
rank_rationale: #1 over #2: stage toys and guide match the 4–6m shift into longer tummy and reaching better than a plain wipe-clean mat alone.
why_it_fits: Longer tummy sessions plus intentional reaching as rolling begins.
caveats: Premium; one gym is usually enough.
gift_note: Big first-year gift — check they lack a large gym.
ownership_note: High ownership risk if a gym already lives downstairs.
rating_source: Lovevery UK / multi-retailer aggregates (spot-check live count)
review_quality_note: Large review base; founder may confirm UK-only count.
buying_factor_memo: Order followed five factors. First, fit to longer tummy and early rolling at 4–6m. Second, surface hygiene for milk and dribble. Third, whether a parent can sit on the mat too. Fourth, UK review depth and brand trust. Fifth, buyability today on a UK primary — OOS gyms dropped from Top 5.

cluster_label: The floor is my little gym
product_description_under_30_words: A reversible Totter and Tumble floor mat with a soft cushioned core and a wipe-clean surface, sized so you can sit beside them for longer tummy sessions without hard boards underneath.
ember_verdict: Once tummy time lasts more than a minute, cold floors punish elbows and knees. A wipe-clean cushioned mat lets you join them on the floor without a giant foam puzzle. Reversible faces keep it looking intentional when visitors walk through after lunch on a busy day.
rank_rationale: #2 over #3: sealed wipe-clean foam beats puzzle tiles for milk-and-dribble floor play.
why_it_fits: Clean supportive surface for floor-as-gym without arches.
ownership_note: Skip if a thick wipe-clean mat already covers the main zone.
buying_factor_memo: Order followed five factors. First, fit to longer tummy and early rolling at 4–6m. Second, surface hygiene for milk and dribble. Third, whether a parent can sit on the mat too. cluster_label: The floor is my little gym
age_mark_on_listing: Suitable for children of all ages (supervised)
product_description_under_30_words: A thick non-toxic EVA foam puzzle playmat in a simple cream rainbow design, so you can build a soft patch on hard floors and pull tiles apart after spills.
ember_verdict: Hard tiles punish longer tummy spells once they push up and rock. Puzzle foam softens the floor without covering the whole room in one roll. Pull one tile aside after a spill and the rest of the patch stays ready for the next try on the same afternoon.
rank_rationale: #3 over #4: patterned starter set is clearer for first-time buyers than plain tiles alone.
ownership_note: Avoid a second foam set if tiles already cover the corner.
substitute_if_unavailable: Plain Playmat Set in Navy, Sage and Cream

cluster_label: The floor is my little gym
product_name: Plain Playmat Set in Navy, Sage and Cream
age_mark_on_listing: Suitable for children of all ages (supervised)
product_description_under_30_words: A Gus and Beau plain EVA foam tile set in navy, sage and cream that expands with extra tiles, giving a soft patch for tummy time on hard floors without busy prints.
ember_verdict: Busy prints can feel loud once the mat stays down all day. Plain tiles keep the floor soft while the room still looks like a living room. Add tiles later if rolling turns into crawling and the soft patch needs to grow with them.
rank_rationale: #4 over #5: expandable plain tiles suit growing floor use better than a second one-piece Totter colourway.
caveats: Plain tiles may not join patterned sets.
gift_note: Good if they want quiet colours.
ownership_note: Do not buy alongside Rainbow unless expanding deliberately.
evidence_notes: Brand primary buyable 2026-07-24. Gus capped at two Top Picks.

cluster_label: The floor is my little gym
product_description_under_30_words: A Totter and Tumble Ludo reversible wipe-clean playmat with the same soft cushion as Mariner, offered in a different double sided print for the main floor zone.
ember_verdict: Some parents want the Totter wipe-clean feel but not the Mariner colours. Ludo keeps the same cushion for longer tummy sessions as rolling starts. Pick one Totter mat only; two large mats in the same home usually just fight for floor space.
rank_rationale: #5: second Totter colourway for print-led buyers; ranked last because Mariner already covers the wipe-clean case.
why_it_fits: Print choice within a proven wipe-clean mat.
gift_note: Only if they lack a Totter mat.
